title: editor component examples
description: Per-component code examples derived from playground .example.svelte files. Agents fetch this to get canonical usage snippets they can copy into a consumer application.

$schema.description: Relative path to the JSON Schema that validates this file.

component.description: Kebab-case id of the component these examples demonstrate. Must match a component id in components.json.

import.description: The import specifier consumers use to import the component. Matches the component's 'import' field in components.json.

examples.description: Ordered list of code examples. Each example is a self-contained Svelte snippet.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier for this example. Derived from the .example.svelte filename (without the extension).

title.description: Short human-readable title for this example.

description.description: One-sentence description of what this example demonstrates.

featured.description: When true, the playground promotes this example on the component Overview.

code.description: The complete, self-contained Svelte snippet source. Consumers can paste this directly into a .svelte file. Imports use the published editor subpath specifiers.
